items.markdown:
A marketing KPI dashboard is `a centralized, visual tool that aggregates real-time data from multiple platforms (e.g., Google Analytics, CRM, social media) to track, analyze, and report on key performance metrics` . It eliminates manual reporting, helping marketing teams visualize campaign success, ROI, and performance against targets at a glance.[](https://dashthis.com/marketing-kpi-dashboard-for-marketers/) [[1]](https://dashthis.com/marketing-kpi-dashboard-for-marketers/)[[2]](https://www.reportdash.com/blog/marketing-kpi-dashboard)[[3]](https://monday.com/blog/marketing/marketing-dashboard/)

**Key Components of a Marketing KPI Dashboard** 

- **Data Integration:** Combines data from social media, email, SEO, and CRM systems.
- **Visualizations:** Uses interactive charts and graphs to make data easy to understand and analyze.
- **Actionable Metrics:** Highlights key indicators that show what is working and what needs optimization.[](https://www.tableau.com/kpi/what-is-kpi-dashboard) [[1]](https://www.tableau.com/kpi/what-is-kpi-dashboard)[[2]](https://monday.com/blog/marketing/marketing-dashboard/)[[3]](https://www.qlik.com/us/dashboard-examples/kpi-dashboards)[[4]](https://www.reportdash.com/blog/marketing-kpi-dashboard)[[5]](https://segmetrics.io/articles/how-to-build-a-powerful-marketing-kpi-dashboard-in-5-simple-steps/)

**Essential KPIs to Track**   
According to [HubSpot](https://www.hubspot.com/glossary/key-performance-indicators) and [SimpleKPI](https://www.simplekpi.com/KPI-Dashboard-Examples) , top metrics include:

- **Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC):** Total costs divided by new customers.
- **Customer Lifetime Value (CLV):** Predicted revenue from a customer.
- **Marketing Originated/Influenced Customer Percentage:** Measures lead quality.
- **Return on Investment (ROI) / ROAS:** Revenue generated compared to ad spend.
- **Conversion Rate:** Percentage of visitors who take action.
- **Cost Per Click (CPC):** Cost for each ad click.[](https://www.thoughtspot.com/data-trends/dashboard/marketing-kpis-metrics) [[1]](https://www.thoughtspot.com/data-trends/dashboard/marketing-kpis-metrics)[[2]](https://www.hubspot.com/glossary/key-performance-indicators)[[3]](https://www.wrike.com/marketing-guide/marketing-dashboard/)[[4]](https://www.oberlo.com/blog/key-performance-indicators-kpis)[[5]](https://www.sybill.ai/blogs/best-sales-dashboards-only-numbers-you-need)

**Popular Marketing Dashboard Tools** 

- **[DashThis](https://dashthis.com/marketing-kpi-dashboard-for-marketers/):** Automated reporting for agencies.
- **[Tableau](https://www.tableau.com/kpi/what-is-kpi-dashboard):** Advanced, interactive data visualization.
- **[Wrike](https://www.wrike.com/marketing-guide/marketing-dashboard/):** For project and campaign management.
- **SimpleKPI:** General, versatile tracking.
- **[HubSpot](https://www.hubspot.com/resources/templates/marketing-dashboard):** Free templates available.[](https://www.simplekpi.com/KPI-Dashboard-Examples) [[1]](https://www.simplekpi.com/KPI-Dashboard-Examples)[[2]](https://dashthis.com/marketing-kpi-dashboard-for-marketers/)[[3]](https://www.tableau.com/kpi/what-is-kpi-dashboard)[[4]](https://www.wrike.com/marketing-guide/marketing-dashboard/)[[5]](https://www.hubspot.com/resources/templates/marketing-dashboard)

**Benefits of a Marketing Dashboard** 

- **Real-time Insights:** Instant updates on campaign performance.
- **Improved Decision Making:** Data-driven choices based on visualized trends.
- **Time Savings:** Automates reporting, removing the need to switch between platforms.
- **Better Communication:** Easily demonstrates marketing value to stakeholders.[](https://dashthis.com/marketing-kpi-dashboard-for-marketers/) [[1]](https://dashthis.com/marketing-kpi-dashboard-for-marketers/)[[2]](https://www.reportdash.com/blog/marketing-kpi-dashboard)[[3]](https://www.tableau.com/kpi/what-is-kpi-dashboard)[[4]](https://monday.com/blog/marketing/marketing-dashboard/)

**Common Types of Marketing Dashboards** 

- **Digital Marketing:** Covers website, social media, and ad performance.
- **SEO:** Focuses on organic search rankings and traffic.
- **Campaign Management:** Tracks specific initiatives like product launches.
- **CMO/Executive:** High-level metrics such as revenue growth and ROI.[](https://www.wrike.com/marketing-guide/marketing-dashboard/) [[1]](https://www.wrike.com/marketing-guide/marketing-dashboard/)[[2]](https://www.hubspot.com/glossary/key-performance-indicators)

items.title: What are the 4 pillars of KPI?

expanded_element.title: The Four Pillars of KPIs : MarketingProfs Master Class Lesson
expanded_element.description: KPIs are a signal that should help inform actions. The best way to identify these signals is to group KPIs into pillars. In this lesson, you'll learn what those pillars are ( Awareness, Consideration, Demand, and Advocacy ) and what insights to glean from each.

items.title: What is an example of a KPI in marketing?

expanded_element.title: 7 Marketing KPIs You Should Know & How to Measure Them - HBS Online
expanded_element.description:
Cost per Click
 Marketing KPIs aren't just about measuring engagement with potential customers; they can also indicate changes you should make to your digital marketing budget. For example, cost per click (CPC) is a KPI that considers the amount you pay each time a user clicks on your paid advertisement.
